title: Geographical and mathematical discussion of Plutarch's account of ancient voyages to the New World

# Geographical and mathematical discussion of Plutarch's account of ancient voyages to the New World

Contributors: albany institute of history and art, ya pamphlet collection (library of congress), colvin, verplanck
Date: 1898-01-01
Subjects: plutarch, knowledge, discovery and exploration, greek, america

"Read before the Albany Institute, April 4, 1893." Includes bibliographical references. Also available in digital form on the Library of Congress Web site.
